title: Spatiotemporal heterogeneity in non-small cell lung cancer: A paradigm shift from characterization to dynamic management (Review).
snippet: Treatment of non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) has entered the era of precision medicine, characterized by targeted therapies and immunotherapies. However, tumor heterogeneity across spatial and temporal dimensions remains a central cause of therapeutic failure and acquired resistance.
